LanguageData.RimChat_CloudProvidersDesc: Use cloud API services like OpenAI, DeepSeek, etc. If output text is truncated, it may be an AI provider issue.
LanguageData.RimChat_LocalProviderDesc: Use locally running models like Player2
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageHint: This setting injects a language requirement into prompts. JSON field names and action IDs stay unchanged.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageTooltip: Function: define response language requirements. Scope: prompt constraints for both diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageFollowSystemToolti: Function: use current game language as prompt language rule. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageCustomTooltip: Function: use custom language label as prompt language rule. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_APIVersionButtonTooltip: Function: open version notes for the current language. Scope: settings-only utility.
LanguageData.RimChat_APIGitHubButtonTooltip: Function: open RimChat GitHub repository. Scope: external browser navigation.
LanguageData.RimChat_CloudApiConfigurationsDesc: Configure multiple API providers, the system will try to use available configs in order
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiProviderFieldTooltip: Function: select API provider for this row. Scope: routing of requests sent by the current API config row.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiKeyFieldTooltip: Function: provide provider key/token. Scope: current API config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiModelFieldTooltip: Function: choose or enter target model. Scope: current API config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_BaseUrlFieldTooltip: Function: set custom-compatible endpoint URL. Scope: current custom-provider config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_CustomUrlModeFieldTooltip: Function: choose how Custom URL is interpreted. Base URL mode auto-completes known chat endpoints; Full Endpoint mode sends requests to the URL as-is.
LanguageData.RimChat_UISettingsTooltip: Function: configure comms-console replacement and typewriter UX. Scope: RimChat interface presentation layer.
LanguageData.RimChat_ReplaceCommsConsoleDesc: Replace the vanilla comms console with diplomacy console, enabling AI dialogue features
LanguageData.RimChat_CommsToggleIconTooltip: Function: quick-toggle comms replacement from map controls. Current: {0}. Scope: map UI icon row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_TokenStatsToggleIconTooltip: Function: quick-toggle API token stats observability window from map controls. Current: {0}. Scope: map UI icon row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedFastDesc: Fast mode: 0.02s/char, English letters faster. For quick plot skipping.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedStandardDesc: Standard mode: 0.05s/char, English letters faster. Comfortable reading speed.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedImmersiveDesc: Immersive mode: 0.11s/char, English letters faster. For savoring dialogues.
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceSettingsTooltip: Function: configure faction online/offline schedule model. Scope: diplomacy dialogue availability decisions.
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceCacheHours: Presence cache duration after closing window (hours): {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_NpcPushSettingsTooltip: Function: configure NPC proactive message behavior. Scope: diplomacy and PawnRPG proactive dialogue scheduling, with separate channel toggles.
LanguageData.RimChat_EnableBusyByHostiles: Busy check: hostile pawns on map
LanguageData.RimChat_NpcPush_DebugTriggerFailed: Trigger failed: load a running save and ensure valid factions with AI configuration exist.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgPush_DebugTriggerFailed: Trigger failed: ensure an eligible initiator pawn and a qualified receiver relation are available.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistNeedGame: Load a save to edit PawnRPG proactive protagonists.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistEmpty: No protagonists configured. PawnRPG proactive dialogue is disabled.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistNoCandidates: No player-faction pawns are available to add.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCircleSettingsTooltip: Function: configure social-circle news cadence and auto-actions. Scope: world-news generation and display flow.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateSuccess: Queued one social-circle world-news generation request.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailed: Failed to queue social-circle news generation: unknown error.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedDisable: Failed to queue: social circle system is disabled.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedAiUnava: Failed to queue: AI service is not configured or unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedQueueFu: Failed to queue: request queue is full. Please wait for pending requests to complete.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedNoSeed: Failed to queue: no available events to generate news from. Wait for more world events to occur.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateDisabledHint: The social circle is disabled, so force-generate is unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateGameHint: Force-generate is available only after loading a save.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateHint: This button is always visible. It queues one fact-based world-news generation request and reschedules the next automatic scan.
LanguageData.RimChat_ConnectionSuccess: Connection successful! API key is valid and response format is correct.
LanguageData.RimChat_CustomUrlMappedHint: Mapped cloud host to API host: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_CustomUrlSuspiciousPathHint: Custom Base URL path looks non-standard for Base URL mode; URL is kept unchanged.
LanguageData.RimChat_CustomUrlChatFallbackHint: Model-list probe failed, chat endpoint probe succeeded.
LanguageData.RimChat_LocalServiceNotFound: Unable to connect to local service. Please make sure the service is running.
LanguageData.RimChat_LastDialogueTokenUsageNoData: Recent dialogue token usage: no data
LanguageData.RimChat_RaidIncomingDesc: {0} is launching a raid against your colony!
LanguageData.RimChat_AIFactionRaidDesc: {0} has launched a raid against your colony due to poor relations.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIFactionCaravanDesc: A caravan from {0} is approaching for trade.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIFactionReinforceDesc: Reinforcements from {0} are arriving to assist you.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIMakePeaceDesc: {0} is willing to make peace with you. {1}
LanguageData.RimChat_AIRequestCaravanDesc: {0} has arranged a caravan to visit: {1}
LanguageData.RimChat_AICreateQuestDesc: {0} has created a quest for your colony: {1}
LanguageData.RimChat_DeclareWarLetterBody: {0} has declared war on your colony!\n\nReason: {1}
LanguageData.RimChat_MakePeaceLetterBody: A peace treaty has been signed with {0}.
LanguageData.RimChat_MilitaryAidLetterBody: {0} has sent military reinforcements to aid your colony!
LanguageData.RimChat_MilitaryAidDelayedLetterBody: {0} has offered military aid, but their forces are delayed.
LanguageData.RimChat_MedicalAidLetterBody: {0} has sent medical supplies via drop pod to aid your colony!
LanguageData.RimChat_ResourceAidLetterBody: {0} has sent resource supplies via drop pod to aid your colony!
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialUnavailable: Social circle data is currently unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialNoPosts: No world-news cards match the current filter.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialPostSummaryFromDialogue: This dialogue has sparked a public social-circle discussion.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialActionBlocked: Player-influence social posts are disabled, so publish action was ignored.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialActionPublished: A social-circle world-news request has been queued.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialActionFailed: Failed to queue social-circle world news.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialActionKeywordCreated: This dialogue triggered a public social-circle news request.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialActionGenerated: Social-circle world news card generated and published.
LanguageData.RimChat_SelectFactionPrompt: Select a faction to view details.
LanguageData.RimChat_WelcomeMessage: Greetings. I am the leader of {0}. What brings you to us today?
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponseTrade: We would be interested in trade. Our caravan will arrive shortly.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponseAidYes: As allies, we shall send reinforcements to assist you.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponseAidNo: We are not yet close enough allies for such assistance. Improve our relations first.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponseWar: Do not threaten us! Such words may lead to consequences.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponsePeace: Peace is always preferable to war. We welcome friendly relations.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIResponseDefault: I understand. We shall consider your words carefully.
LanguageData.RimChat_AIControlledDesc: This faction uses AI for diplomatic decisions and may initiate dialogue
LanguageData.RimChat_StandardBehaviorDesc: This faction uses standard RimWorld behavior patterns
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_API_Tooltip: Function: configure providers, API keys, and output language. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_ModOptions_Tooltip: Function: configure global RimChat behavior modules. Scope: AI behavior, presence, social circle, and safety controls.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_DiplomacyDialogue_Tooltip: Function: configure diplomacy prompt pipeline. Scope: faction diplomacy channel system-prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_PawnDialogue_Tooltip: Function: configure pawn dialogue prompt pipeline. Scope: pawn RPG channel system-prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_RimTalk_Tooltip: Function: configure RimTalk compatibility by channel and manage variable injection templates. Scope: diplomacy and RPG prompt compatibility overlays.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_ImageApi_Tooltip: Function: configure standalone diplomacy image generation endpoint and prompt templates. Scope: send_image action only.
LanguageData.RimChat_ImageApiProviderPresetHint: Choose a mainstream provider preset first. Endpoint/mode/auth defaults are auto-filled.
LanguageData.RimChat_ImageApiNoAuthHint: No API key required for current auth mode.
LanguageData.RimChat_ImageApiModeHint: Allowed: sync_url, sync_payload, async_job (ComfyUI uses async_job).
LanguageData.RimChat_ImageApiSchemaPresetHint: Allowed: ark, openai, comfyui, custom. comfyui auto-switches to async_job.
LanguageData.RimChat_ImageApiExperimentalHint: Experimental feature: defaults to Volcengine image API. Disabled by default; enable only when needed.
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageCaptionStylePromptHint: Used to guide AI caption tone for generated images. Caption language follows current game language.
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageCaptionFallbackTemplate: Used when AI does not return caption. Placeholders: {leader} {faction} {template_name}
LanguageData.RimChat_AIBehaviorSettingsTooltip: Function: enable or disable diplomacy actions available to AI. Scope: diplomacy action whitelist in API execution.
LanguageData.RimChat_RaidSettingsTooltip: Function: tune raid strategies and arrival modes. Scope: AI-initiated raid generation stage.
LanguageData.RimChat_CenterDropWarning: Warning: Center drop may cause severe damage to your colony!
LanguageData.RimChat_RaidOverrideNoFactionsFound: No available factions found for override.
LanguageData.RimChat_GoodwillSettingsTooltip: Function: cap goodwill delta and adjustment frequency. Scope: diplomacy relation change safety thresholds.
LanguageData.RimChat_GoodwillWarning: Warning: Single adjustment should not exceed half of daily limit
LanguageData.RimChat_GiftSettingsTooltip: Function: cap gift value and goodwill gain. Scope: gift action resolution rules.
LanguageData.RimChat_AidSettingsTooltip: Function: set aid thresholds, cooldown, and delay. Scope: aid action trigger and arrival flow.
LanguageData.RimChat_WarPeaceSettingsTooltip: Function: configure declaration and peace parameters. Scope: war/peace diplomacy action resolution.
LanguageData.RimChat_CaravanSettingsTooltip: Function: configure caravan cooldown and travel delay. Scope: trade caravan dispatch flow.
LanguageData.RimChat_QuestSettingsTooltip: Function: configure AI quest publish interval. Scope: diplomacy quest generation scheduling.
LanguageData.RimChat_SecuritySettingsTooltip: Function: control API logging and rate limits. Scope: global request safety and throttling controls.
LanguageData.RimChat_ResetSectionConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings in "{0}" to their default values? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionPromptSettingsDesc: Customize AI dialogue style and tone for each faction. Select a faction from the left to edit prompts on the right.
LanguageData.RimChat_GlobalPromptSettingsDesc: Configure base system prompts and dialogue templates applied to all faction conversations.
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemPromptDesc: Define AI's base behavior patterns, role positioning, and global constraints
LanguageData.RimChat_DialoguePromptDesc: Define the context structure and response format template for dialogues
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptLengthWarning: Long prompts may cause API call failures or increased costs
LanguageData.RimChat_SelectFactionForPrompt: Please select a faction from the left to edit prompts
LanguageData.RimChat_ResetPromptConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset {0}'s prompt to default?
LanguageData.RimChat_ImportFailed: Import failed, please check file format
LanguageData.RimChat_ResetAllPromptsConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all faction prompts to default? This cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSystemPromptDesc: Defines AI base behavior in RPG dialogue mode
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialoguePromptDesc: Defines context structure in RPG dialogue mode
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt here to define AI's base behavior...
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptTooLong: Prompt too long! Please reduce content.
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorNoConfig: No valid AI configuration found. Please configure API in mod settings.
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorInvalidUrl: API URL must start with http:// or https://
LanguageData.RimChat_Error401Local: Local model authentication failed: Please check if local service is running, or try leaving API Key empty in configuration
LanguageData.RimChat_Error401Cloud: API key is invalid or expired. Please check API configuration in mod settings
LanguageData.RimChat_Error404: Requested API endpoint does not exist. Please check Base URL configuration
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorConnectionLocal: Cannot connect to local model service. Please confirm: 1. Ollama/Player2 service is running 2. Port number is correct 3. Firewall is not blocking
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorConnectionCloud: Cannot connect to cloud API service. Please check network connection
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorTimeout: Request timeout. AI service response time is too long
LanguageData.RimChat_ErrorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later
LanguageData.RimChat_AlbumSaveFailed: Failed to save image to album: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_SelfieConfigInvalid: Image API is not configured or disabled.
LanguageData.RimChat_SelfieDefaultPrompt: Create a clean selfie portrait of {0}, with grounded RimWorld style and clear face details.
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacyInputLockedByTyping: Waiting for the other side to finish speaking...
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacyTypingStatus_12: The other side is getting out of bed
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacyTypingStatus_13: The opposing leader is using an addictive substance
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacyTypingStatus_14: The opposing leader is renewing the comms plan
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceBlockedOffline: Currently offline. You cannot send messages.
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceBlockedDnd: Currently set to do not disturb. You cannot send messages.
LanguageData.RimChat_ConversationEnded: The other side ended this dialogue session.
LanguageData.RimChat_ConversationEndedReason: The other side ended this dialogue session: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_StrategyReadyHint: Strategies ready: click a button to auto-send ({0}/{1} left)
LanguageData.RimChat_StrategyFallbackReply1: Have your best social negotiator secure reciprocal trade terms first to stabilize supply lines.
LanguageData.RimChat_StrategyFallbackReply2: Build a resource transfer cadence and prioritize swapping for high-value shortages.
LanguageData.RimChat_StrategyFallbackReply3: Keep a risk buffer and establish a safety pact with nearby factions to protect trade routes.
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemExitDialogue: The other side ended the current dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemExitDialogueWithReason: The other side ended the current dialogue: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemSetDnd: The other side switched to do-not-disturb.
LanguageData.RimChat_SystemSetDndWithReason: The other side switched to do-not-disturb: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageOnlyOnePerTurn: Only one send_image action is allowed per turn.
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageConfigInvalid: Image action blocked: diplomacy image API is disabled or not configured.
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageTemplateRequired: Image action blocked: parameter template_id is required.
LanguageData.RimChat_SendImageTemplateMissing: Image action blocked: template not found or disabled: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_ComfyCheckpointMissing: ComfyUI checkpoint not found: {0}. Set Image model to an existing file name under ComfyUI/models/checkpoints (e.g. xxx.safetensors).
LanguageData.RimChat_AdvancedPromptSettingsDesc: Configure various components of the system prompt. Supports simple and advanced mode switching.
LanguageData.RimChat_SimpleModeHint: Simple Mode: Edit the global system prompt, other configs use default values
LanguageData.RimChat_InjectMemoryDataTooltip: Function: inject dialogue memory summaries into prompts. Scope: dynamic context blocks for diplomacy and pawn dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_InjectFactionInfoTooltip: Function: inject faction profile and relation context. Scope: dynamic context blocks for diplomacy and pawn dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_UseHierarchicalPromptFormatToolt: Function: assemble prompts with hierarchical node templates. Scope: diplomacy prompt main assembly pipeline.
LanguageData.RimChat_DialogueCompressionEnabledToolti: Function: compress older history to reduce prompt length. Scope: diplomacy history injection stage.
LanguageData.RimChat_GlobalSystemPromptSectionTooltip: Function: edit shared system-level constraints. Scope: common preamble for diplomacy and pawn dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_GlobalPrompt_Toolt: Function: edit global system/dialogue baseline text. Scope: diplomacy prompt backbone plus shared preamble layers.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_EnvironmentPrompts: Function: configure environment prompts and scene matching. Scope: environment injection layer for diplomacy and pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_FactionPrompts_Too: Function: configure faction-specific style templates. Scope: diplomacy faction branch prompt layer.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_ApiActions_Tooltip: Function: configure diplomacy API action guidance. Scope: diplomacy action contract segment.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_JsonTemplate_Toolt: Function: configure diplomacy JSON response template. Scope: diplomacy response format contract.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_ImportantRules_Too: Function: configure high-priority diplomacy rules. Scope: diplomacy decision and behavior constraints.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_PromptTemplates_To: Function: configure shared rendering template fragments. Scope: diplomacy hierarchical node rendering.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_PromptPolicy_Toolt: Function: configure budgets and intent mapping policy. Scope: diplomacy prompt trimming and action tendency controls.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_SocialCirclePrompt: Function: configure social-circle world-news templates. Scope: diplomacy window social news generation flow.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_DecisionRules_Tool: Function: configure diplomacy action decision rules. Scope: diplomacy action selection stage.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptSection_DynamicData_Toolti: Function: configure dynamic-data injection switches. Scope: diplomacy prompt dynamic context layer.
LanguageData.RimChat_ResetPromptConfigConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all prompt configurations to default? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimChat_FilePickerUnavailable: System file picker is unavailable. Please enter the file path manually.
LanguageData.RimChat_FilePickerFallbackOpened: Native file picker unavailable. Opened directory: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptBundleNoModuleSelected: Please select at least one module.
LanguageData.RimChat_SelectApiAction: Select an API action to edit
LanguageData.RimChat_SelectDecisionRule: Select a decision rule to edit
LanguageData.RimChat_ClickToTrade: Click here to open trade dialog
LanguageData.RimChat_NegotiatorUnavailable: No negotiator available (colonist must use comms console)
LanguageData.RimChat_UsePermitHint: Please use this permit from the colonist panel or world map.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGPawnPersonaNeedGame: You need a loaded save to edit per-pawn persona prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGPawnPersonaNoPawn: No editable colony humanlike pawns were found.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGPawnPersonaPromptDesc: This content is injected only for this pawn in RPG dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_EnvironmentSelectSceneHint: Select a scene entry from the list to edit.
LanguageData.RimChat_EnvironmentPreviewNoContext: No sample context available. Preview is empty.
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacySceneTagsTooltip: Function: append diplomacy scene tags. Scope: additionalSceneTags injection input for diplomacy prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_RpgSceneTagsTooltip: Function: append RPG scene tags. Scope: additionalSceneTags injection input for pawn dialogue prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_RpgPreviewNoContext: No sample pawns available for RPG preview.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGHistoryEmpty: No dialogue history in this session yet.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogue_CooldownRejected: They refuse to continue talking for now. Please try again later.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogue_EndedByNpc: The other side ended this dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogue_EndedByNpcReason: The other side ended this dialogue: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogue_CooldownRejectedWith: They refuse to continue talking for now (about {0} hours remaining).
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogue_CooldownBlockedWithH: They are not accepting dialogue right now (about {0} hours remaining).
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGActionToast_CooldownApplied: System: dialogue cooldown applied for {0} day(s).
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGActionFail_InvalidTarget: Current target does not meet execution conditions
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGActionFail_GameRejected: Action was rejected by game mechanics
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSystem_MemoryRollFailed: System: memory roll failed (round {0}, target {1}%, roll {2}%).
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSystem_MemoryNoDef: System: memory roll passed, but no valid ThoughtDef was found.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSystem_MemoryRollSuccess: System: memory roll succeeded (round {0}, target {1}%, roll {2}%), auto-added {3}.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiPromptEditingLocked: API prompt settings are locked. Enable the toggle above to edit them.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiPromptEditingWarning: Warning: modifying API prompt settings can cause the model to call invalid APIs, generate invalid quests, or trigger runtime errors. Only change these if you understand the impact.
LanguageData.RimChat_DeleteConfirm: Delete selected {0}? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimChat_VariableInsertFailed: Variable insertion failed: current section is not editable or no scene entry is selected.
LanguageData.RimChat_VariableValidationNoTemplate: No editable template text found in the current section.
LanguageData.RimChat_VariableValidationPass: Variable validation passed. Found {0} known variable(s).
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_scene_tags_Desc: All normalized scenario tags for current preview context.
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_environment_params_D: Environment parameter lines (time, weather, location, etc.).
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_recent_world_events_: Recent world events and raid intel block.
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_colony_status_Desc: Current colony status summary (maps, colonists, wealth, date).
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_colony_factions_Desc: Known faction list with goodwill/relation snapshots.
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_player_pawn_profile_: Player negotiator profile snapshot (explicit negotiator first, fallback to highest-social colonist).
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_player_royalty_summa: Empire honor/title/permit summary with soft action constraints for diplomacy prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_TemplateVar_faction_settlement_s: Current faction settlement count and full settlement list for action feasibility.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_RimTalkCompatTools_To: Function: configure RimTalk variable compatibility template. Scope: pawn dialogue compatibility injection layer.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkCompatAffectsBoth: This section affects both Diplomacy and RPG prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkCompatEntryHint: RimTalk variable injection tools are available in the dedicated RimTalk tools section.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPresetInjectionMaxEntries: Active preset mod entries max injected count: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPresetInjectionMaxChars: Active preset mod entries max injected chars: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkCompatTemplateHint: Supports RimTalk Scriban syntax and plugin variables. Rendering failure falls back to raw text.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPersonaCopyTemplateHint: Supports `pawn.personality` or `{{pawn.personality}}`. Applied only to colony humanlike pawns with empty RimChat persona prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPersonaManualCopySummary: RimTalk persona sync finished. Updated: {0}, Cleared: {1}, Unchanged: {2}, Skipped: {3}.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPersonaCopyTemplateEmpty: RimTalk persona copy skipped: template is empty.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkPersonaCopyRenderedEmpty: RimTalk persona copy skipped: template rendered empty content.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkVariableInjectHint: Selected RimTalk variables are appended into the current channel template, then rendered into RimChat prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkCompatVariableHelp: Global keys: rimchat_last_session_summary, rimchat_last_diplomacy_summary, rimchat_last_rpg_summary, rimchat_recent_session_summaries.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkVariableBrowserHint: Click Insert to append the selected variable token into the compatibility template.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkVariableAlreadyInTemplate: This variable already exists in the compatibility template.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryCreatorHint: Adds/updates an entry in the active RimTalk preset. This is compatible with plugin variables.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryWriteInvalidInput: Failed to write entry: name and content are required.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryWriteBridgeUnavailab: Failed to write entry: RimTalk compatibility bridge is unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryWritePresetUnavailab: Failed to write entry: active RimTalk preset is unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryWriteCreateFailed: Failed to write entry: could not create RimTalk prompt entry object.
LanguageData.RimChat_RimTalkEntryWriteInsertFailed: Failed to write entry: insert/add operation failed.
LanguageData.RimChat_NoFactionPrompts: No faction prompt configurations are available.
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionPromptEditorDesc: Edit this faction's dialogue style, including core style, wording traits, tone, and related dimensions.
LanguageData.RimChat_RemoveFactionTemplateConfirm: Remove faction template for {0}? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionTemplateExistingSelected: Faction template already exists and has been selected: {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionTemplateRemoveDefaultBloc: Default faction templates cannot be removed.
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionTemplateMissingDesc: This faction def is currently missing (likely from an unloaded mod). The template is kept for compatibility.
LanguageData.RimChat_FactionPromptReset: {0}'s prompt has been reset to default.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptTemplateEditorDesc: Edit each faction prompt template field independently. Changes are written back to the faction prompt config when saved.
LanguageData.RimChat_FieldCoreStyleDesc: Describes the faction's core dialogue style.
LanguageData.RimChat_FieldVocabularyDesc: Describes wording habits and signature vocabulary.
LanguageData.RimChat_GlobalDialoguePromptSectionToolt: Function: edit diplomacy dialogue body template. Scope: diplomacy dialogue-layer prompt text.
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptPolicyEnabled: Enable prompt policy budgets and intent mapping
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptPolicyResetOnUpgradeLabel: Reset prompt custom overrides on schema upgrade
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptPolicyTrimPriorityLabel: Global trim priority node ids (one per line)
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCirclePromptFlow: Editing flow: 1) Update the social-circle action rule template; 2) tune the world-news style / JSON contract / fact template; 3) update publish_public_post action metadata; 4) click Save Prompt in the left panel.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCirclePromptPersistenceHin: Defaults come from Prompt/Default/SocialCirclePrompt_Default.json; edits are saved to Prompt/Custom/SocialCirclePrompt_Custom.json.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_FallbackTemplates_Too: Function: edit RPG fallback templates. Scope: degraded-format and recovery prompt paths.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_ApiPromptTemplates_To: Function: edit RPG API action templates. Scope: action guidance segment in pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGRoleSettingTooltip: Function: define baseline persona and behavioral foundation. Scope: role-setting segment in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogueStyleTooltip: Function: define visible dialogue tone and writing style. Scope: visible-text generation segment in pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGFormatConstraintTooltip: Function: define output format and JSON contract. Scope: action parsing stage in pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectSelfStatusTooltip: Function: inject current NPC self status. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectInterlocutorStatusToolt: Function: inject interlocutor (player side) state. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectFactionBackground: Faction Background: relationship and ideology context
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectFactionBackgroundToolti: Function: inject faction relation and ideology context. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_EnableRPGNonVerbalPawnSpeechTool: Function: force non-verbal target replies into sound + inner-thought format. Scope: visible NPC reply formatting and RPG request-time constraint injection.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGNonVerbalFallbackThought: its instincts pulse in fragmented signals
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_RoleSetting_Tooltip: Function: edit RPG role-setting template. Scope: role-setting segment in pawn dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_DialogueStyle_Tooltip: Function: edit RPG dialogue-style template. Scope: visible dialogue style segment in pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_DynamicInjection_Tool: Function: configure RPG dynamic injection switches. Scope: runtime context injection layer for pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_PawnPersonaPrompts_To: Function: edit per-pawn persona overrides. Scope: extra system prompt block when that pawn is the RPG target.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_FormatConstraint_Tool: Function: edit RPG output constraints. Scope: action JSON protocol constraints in pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_OpenApiDebugWindowButtonTooltip: Open Token/Full Log observability window (real-world recent 60 minutes).
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiDebugNoSelection: Select one item to inspect full request/response.
